name: Cw Scottish Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add 3-3/4 cups of flour to the mixture; mix well.
3. Sprinkle the remaining flour on a clean surface. Turn the dough out onto this surface.
4. Knead the dough for about 5 minutes, adding more flour if needed to keep it soft and non-sticky.
5. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into 3" x 1-inch strips using a sharp knife.
7. Arrange the strips 1 inch apart on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Prick each strip with a fork.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned.
Yield: about 4 dozen
